Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: footwear by form [300252212], footwear [300209280], accessories by location on the legs or feet [300211599], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Shoes consisting essentially of a sole fastened to the foot by straps, strips, or cords.
Schoenen die voornamelijk bestaan uit een zool die aan de voet is bevestigd door middel van riempjes, banden of koorden.
Schuh, der im Wesentlichen aus einer Sohle besteht und mit Gurten, Bändern oder Schnüren am Fuß befestigt wird.
Zapatos que consisten esencialmente en una suela sujeta al pie por medio de correas, tiras o cordones.
Teccactli tlen zampa zan pan motlalia toicxi huan moihilpitoc ica cuetlaxtli zo ce tlamantli iloh.

Calzature estive leggere, maschili e femminili, costituite da una suola fermata al piede da strisce o fasce di cuoio, pelle o altro materiale, variamente sagomate, che lasciano più o meno liberi e scoperti le dita e il tallone.
أحذية تتكون أساسًا من نعل مثبت على القدم بواسطة أحزمة أو شرائط أو حبال.

Term_Source.Page: illustration, Vol. 2, "Vocabulary of Basic Terms for Cataloguing Costume" - ICOM International Committee.

Source.Source_ID: 2000030201/National Museum of American History, Dictionary of Costume (n.d.)
2000030231/Thornton and Swann, Glossary of Shoe Terms (1986)

Term_Source.Page: Essentially a sole (single or multi layer) held on to the foot by straps varying in complexity.

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)
2000001681/Livandi, Thesaurus of Clothing and Textile Terms, Personal Artifacts (1990)
